metadata.title: Tier 2 plugin-nfr sub-rubric
metadata.description: Plugin-specific NFR rules calibrated for Claude Code plugin projects. Activates only when project-config.yaml declares project_kind: claude-code-plugin. Layer 2 (sub-rubric) of the four-layer rubric composition (base + sub + regime + project) per ADR-079 + ADR-088. Skill is `perf` because NFR-PLUGIN-1 (install latency) is the primary review-pipeline carrier; the loader's RFC 7396 array-replace semantics (intentional per ADR-079) require sibling sub-rubrics under different skill buckets to coexist without overwriting each other's severity_rules. Loads NFR-PLUGIN-1 (Plugin Install Latency, Warning when > 8s), NFR-PLUGIN-2 (SKILL.md Token Budget, Warning > 1500 / Critical >= 2000), NFR-PLUGIN-3 (Claude Code Version Compatibility, High when min version missing or untested), and NFR-PLUGIN-4 (allowed-tools claims-vs-usage drift, Critical on any drift) as enforceable rubric rules per FR-422. NFR-PLUGIN-2 and NFR-PLUGIN-4 are also surfaced by sibling sub-rubrics (plugin-code per E77-S5 / FR-407 — skill=code, and plugin-security per E77-S6 / FR-408 — skill=security); the plugin-nfr sub-rubric is the canonical NFR-pipeline carrier — sibling sub-rubrics enforce them at the code-review and security-review layers.

install_latency.description: NFR-PLUGIN-1 — A cold install of a Claude Code plugin via `/plugin marketplace install` MUST complete within 8 seconds wall-clock on the reference machine. Includes manifest fetch, file write, and frontmatter index. Excludes user confirmation prompts. Rule fires Warning (Medium) when measured P95 cold install exceeds 8s.

skill_md_token_budget.description: NFR-PLUGIN-2 — Each SKILL.md (auto-loaded surface) MUST be <= 1500 tokens. Body content over the budget MUST live in JIT-loaded helper skills. Warning (Medium) fires when measured tokens exceed 1500; Critical fires at 2000 or more. The plugin-code sub-rubric (E77-S5) carries the same two-tier enforcement at the code-review layer.

version_compatibility.ci_required_versions: two most-recent stable Claude Code versions
version_compatibility.description: NFR-PLUGIN-3 — Each plugin MUST declare a Claude Code minimum version in manifest.yaml AND MUST pass its CI test suite on the two most-recent stable Claude Code versions. Missing min-version declaration OR untested second version both fire High severity per the calibrated table in story E77-S15.

allowed_tools_drift.description: NFR-PLUGIN-4 — A skill's allowed-tools declaration in frontmatter MUST match the tools the skill actually invokes. Any drift (a tool used at runtime but not declared) MUST surface as a CRITICAL finding. The plugin-security sub-rubric (E77-S6) is the primary carrier at the security-review layer; plugin-nfr loads the rule for completeness in the NFR-pipeline view.

severity_rules.pattern: Cold install of the plugin via `/plugin marketplace install` exceeds 8 seconds wall-clock on the reference machine (8-core, 16GB RAM, broadband). Measured by the install-latency check in the plugin CI template (E77-S16). Excludes user confirmation prompts; includes manifest fetch, file write, and frontmatter index.
severity_rules.description: Per NFR-PLUGIN-1, a cold install over 8s is a Warning-class signal — slow installs erode adoption and indicate manifest bloat or large-file checked-in artifacts. Rule fires when measured P95 cold install exceeds the 8-second budget on the reference machine.
severity_rules.remediation: Profile the install path with the marketplace-publish adapter (FR-423) instrumentation. Common culprits: oversized SKILL.md files (cross-check against NFR-PLUGIN-2), bundled binaries committed to the plugin tree, or unnecessary fixture trees. Trim the install surface and re-measure.

severity_rules.pattern: Any SKILL.md file in the plugin tree measures more than 1500 tokens (soft ceiling). Approximate tokenizer: 4 chars per token. Sibling enforcement: plugin-code-skill-md-token-budget-warning (E77-S5) at the code-review layer.
severity_rules.description: Per NFR-PLUGIN-2, a SKILL.md exceeding 1500 tokens trips a WARNING signal. The skill is approaching the 2000-token hard ceiling; trim verbose narrative, extract reasoning into the skill's playbook, or split into focused sub-skills before further additions.
severity_rules.remediation: Move long-form rationale into the playbook, prune redundant bullet lists, or split the skill along its TDD / planning / lifecycle seams. Re-measure with the same 4-chars-per-token approximation.

severity_rules.pattern: Any SKILL.md file in the plugin tree measures 2000 tokens or more (hard ceiling). Approximate tokenizer: 4 chars per token. Sibling enforcement: plugin-code-skill-md-token-budget-critical (E77-S5) at the code-review layer.
severity_rules.description: Per NFR-PLUGIN-2, a SKILL.md at or above 2000 tokens MUST NOT merge. The skill exceeds the per-skill token budget that keeps Claude Code's planning context tractable. Split or trim the skill before re-running review.
severity_rules.remediation: Split the skill into smaller, focused skills (one workflow per skill) or extract long narrative into the playbook. Re-measure and confirm the total drops below 2000 tokens.

severity_rules.pattern: manifest.yaml is missing a `min_claude_code_version` declaration OR the CI test suite is not configured to run against the two most-recent stable Claude Code versions. Detected by the plugin-frontmatter-validator adapter (FR-409) for the missing-declaration case and by the plugin CI template (FR-418) for the missing-version-matrix case.
severity_rules.description: Per NFR-PLUGIN-3, every plugin MUST declare a Claude Code minimum version in manifest.yaml AND MUST pass its CI test suite on the two most-recent stable Claude Code versions. Missing declaration or untested second version is a High-severity finding — downstream consumers cannot pin compatibility and silent breakage on Claude Code upgrades is masked.
severity_rules.remediation: Add `min_claude_code_version: <semver>` to manifest.yaml. Update the plugin CI template to invoke the adapter suite under both the current and the previous stable Claude Code versions (matrix).

severity_rules.pattern: A SKILL.md file in the plugin tree invokes a tool (Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob, Agent, WebFetch, WebSearch, Task) that is not declared in its frontmatter `allowed-tools:` list. Detected by scripts/allowed-tools-drift-check.sh which parses the SKILL.md frontmatter, scans the skill body and any referenced scripts, and reports each undeclared tool invocation. Sibling enforcement: plugin-security-allowed-tools-drift (E77-S6) at the security-review layer.
severity_rules.description: Per NFR-PLUGIN-4 / SR-33, plugin skills that invoke tools not declared in `allowed-tools:` create a privilege-escalation surface (T-37). The Claude Code harness only enforces allowed-tools at the skill boundary — a skill that quietly grows new tool usage past its declared surface can elevate the plugin's effective capabilities without review. Drift MUST emit CRITICAL — no downgrade, no allowlist.
severity_rules.remediation: Either remove the undeclared tool invocation from the skill (and its referenced scripts) or update the SKILL.md frontmatter `allowed-tools:` list to include the tool, then have a security reviewer confirm the new capability is intentional.
